guest.exec_model: The PoC is a single userspace C program cross-compiled into the guest rootfs and run as root inside QEMU. A KASAN report on the kernel log is the crash signal.

entrypoints.interface: AF_PSMGR SOCK_SEQPACKET socket, sendmsg DATA message
entrypoints.driver: socket(AF_PSMGR=46, SOCK_SEQPACKET, 0), bind, setsockopt MANAGED role + WINDOW/LINEAR/proc_param=127, send DATA message
Send COMMIT_REQ with pre-installed handler to trigger psmgr_core.c:361
